channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Shipowner Offers Sailors 6-Fold Pay To Cross Strait Of Hormuz: Report

media:content.media:description: The proposal was circulated before the latest attacks on merchant vessels on Monday

item.description: According to a document seen by Bloomberg, a company offered seafarers an additional six months' salary if they completed a round trip through the strait to collect crude oil from Saudi Arabia or Iraq and unload it in the Gulf of Oman.
item.content:encoded: According to a document seen by Bloomberg, a company offered seafarers an additional six months' salary if they completed a round trip through the strait to collect crude oil from Saudi Arabia or Iraq and unload it in the Gulf of Oman.

item.title: Man Accused Of Killing 6 Child Welfare Workers In Germany Found Dead In Jail

media:content.media:description: No current third-party involvement in suspect's death in jail, says ministry.

item.description: The suspect, who has been partially identified in German media as 45-year-old Fatih Khan G., was found dead by jail staff in his single cell early Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: The suspect, who has been partially identified in German media as 45-year-old Fatih Khan G., was found dead by jail staff in his single cell early Tuesday.

item.title: Kuwait Says Iran Hit Several Power, Water Desalination Plants
item.description: Kuwait's ministry of electricity confirmed fires at several facilities due to repeated attacks by Iran over four days.
item.content:encoded: Kuwait's ministry of electricity confirmed fires at several facilities due to repeated attacks by Iran over four days.

item.title: 144 Refugees Dead Or Missing Since Mauritania Maritime Incidents: UN Report

media:content.media:description: UNHCR said that 17 disembarkations were recorded in Nouadhibou and Nouakchott in 2026. (Representational)

item.description: The UN refugee agency UNHCR said that overall, three rescue and disembarkation operations were conducted between July 14 and 18 in Nouadhibou, Mauritania, bringing 387 people of various nationalities safely ashore.
item.content:encoded: The UN refugee agency UNHCR said that overall, three rescue and disembarkation operations were conducted between July 14 and 18 in Nouadhibou, Mauritania, bringing 387 people of various nationalities safely ashore.

item.title: France Sees Worst Wildfire Season Since Record 2022 Blazes

media:content.media:description: Wildfires hit Fontainebleau forest near Paris, as well as southern France and Corsica.

item.description: The devastated area is about four times the size of Paris. And the area burned so far in 2026 has already far exceeded the total for all of 2025. France's all-time annual record stands at 66,300 hectares burned in 2022.
item.content:encoded: The devastated area is about four times the size of Paris. And the area burned so far in 2026 has already far exceeded the total for all of 2025. France's all-time annual record stands at 66,300 hectares burned in 2022.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Kaveri To J-20, How China Overtook India In A 40-Year-Old Race To Build Fighter Jets
item.description: Both launched ambitious military jet engine programmes during the 1980s. Both depended heavily on Soviet and Russian technology. Four decades later, however, the finish line tells two dramatically different stories.
item.content:encoded: Both launched ambitious military jet engine programmes during the 1980s. Both depended heavily on Soviet and Russian technology. Four decades later, however, the finish line tells two dramatically different stories.

item.title: US Student Visa Rule Change: F-1, J-1 Holders Advised To Return By This Day

media:content.media:description: The new rule will come into effect on September 15.

item.description: According to DHS, students already in the US under D/S on September 15 can continue to remain until the programme completion date mentioned on their Form I-20 or until the end of approved optional practical training.
item.content:encoded: According to DHS, students already in the US under D/S on September 15 can continue to remain until the programme completion date mentioned on their Form I-20 or until the end of approved optional practical training.

item.title: Brazil To Australia: World Shifts Towards Social Media Bans For Children

media:content.media:description: Social media has been banned for under-16s in Australia since December 2025. (Representational)

item.description: A proposal to ban social media for under-15 children is to be voted on by France's parliament on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: A proposal to ban social media for under-15 children is to be voted on by France's parliament on Tuesday.

item.title: US Justice Department Probes Harvard's China-Based Financial Aid Programs

media:content.media:description: Harvard said it was reviewing the Justice Department notice.

item.description: The Justice Department said Chinese donors have given money to Harvard to support financial aid programs limited to students from certain countries.
item.content:encoded: The Justice Department said Chinese donors have given money to Harvard to support financial aid programs limited to students from certain countries.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | US Attack On Chabahar, And Why It's Time India Stopped Playing By Others' Whims
item.description: As the US destroys Chabahar in Iran, one thing is clear: India cannot wait eternally for the whims of others to do what is vital for its own interests.
item.content:encoded: As the US destroys Chabahar in Iran, one thing is clear: India cannot wait eternally for the whims of others to do what is vital for its own interests.

item.title: In Gaza, A Mother's Search For Water Reveals A Worsening Health Crisis

media:content.media:description: Her struggle reflects a wider reality across Gaza.

item.description: Families queue for hours beside battered water trucks to receive a few litres, before returning to disease-stricken, overcrowded tent camps.
item.content:encoded: Families queue for hours beside battered water trucks to receive a few litres, before returning to disease-stricken, overcrowded tent camps.

item.title: Deadly Heatwaves Push Ageing France To Prepare For A Hotter Future
item.description: Historic high temperatures, arriving ever-earlier in the year, have sparked unprecedented wildfires near Paris, shuttered schools and strained ill-equipped hospitals.
item.content:encoded: Historic high temperatures, arriving ever-earlier in the year, have sparked unprecedented wildfires near Paris, shuttered schools and strained ill-equipped hospitals.

item.title: Indian Tourists In Singapore Steal Diamond Worth $1,54,000, Hide It In Mouth

media:content.media:description: Indian national jailed after diamond swap heist plot at Singapore jewellery store

item.description: Indian national Mangroliya Manojkumar Kurjibhai jailed in Singapore after swapping a genuine diamond worth USD154,000 with a fake at a Chinatown store
item.content:encoded: Indian national Mangroliya Manojkumar Kurjibhai jailed in Singapore after swapping a genuine diamond worth USD154,000 with a fake at a Chinatown store

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Not Just Jets, China Is Developing A '5-Piece' Carrier Set, And India Should Worry
item.description: China is now the only state serially producing two distinct stealth fighter families simultaneously, with some estimates projecting that advanced-fighter output across all jet programmes could reach 300-400 aircraft annually by 2027.
item.content:encoded: China is now the only state serially producing two distinct stealth fighter families simultaneously, with some estimates projecting that advanced-fighter output across all jet programmes could reach 300-400 aircraft annually by 2027.

item.title: Andrew Tate, Brother Tristan Fight Extradition To UK Over Rape, Sex Trafficking Charges

media:content.media:description: Last year, brothers were allowed to leave Romania and flew to Florida.

item.description: The brothers are already charged with rape, bodily harm, human trafficking, and controlling prostitution for gain relating to three other alleged victims in the U.K. between 2012 and 2015.
item.content:encoded: The brothers are already charged with rape, bodily harm, human trafficking, and controlling prostitution for gain relating to three other alleged victims in the U.K. between 2012 and 2015.

item.title: Iran Say It Hit US Military Targets In Bahrain, Kuwait

media:content.media:description: Iran's army said it targeted "three major US bases in Kuwait" with kamikaze drones.

item.description: The announcement came as the United States said it struck Iranian military command centres, air defence systems and missile launch sites in overnight attacks.
item.content:encoded: The announcement came as the United States said it struck Iranian military command centres, air defence systems and missile launch sites in overnight attacks.

item.title: China May Tighten AI Export Rules To Block Western Buyouts: Report

media:content.media:description: Potential restrictions could also be imposed on the overseas acquisition of strategic technology

item.description: Regulators led by China's Ministry of Commerce have been consulting top homegrown AI and chipmaking companies on how to stop China's advanced technologies and leading start-ups from being acquired by the west
item.content:encoded: Regulators led by China's Ministry of Commerce have been consulting top homegrown AI and chipmaking companies on how to stop China's advanced technologies and leading start-ups from being acquired by the west

item.title: "Unacceptable": India Protests Deaths Of 4 Indian Sailors In Russian Attack Near Ukraine

media:content.media:description: The incident came amid escalating hostilities between Ukraine and Russia.

item.description: India has condemned the attack and reiterated that targeting commercial shipping and endangering innocent civilian crew members is "deplorable and should be avoided."
item.content:encoded: India has condemned the attack and reiterated that targeting commercial shipping and endangering innocent civilian crew members is "deplorable and should be avoided."

item.title: 5 Killed In Apparent Mass Drowning In Ohio River In US

media:content.media:description: The bodies of the three missing men were recovered the next day

item.description: As the swimmer began to struggle in the water, two other adults tried to assist him but began floundering themselves, leading two more adults to make rescue attempts before all five disappeared in the river
item.content:encoded: As the swimmer began to struggle in the water, two other adults tried to assist him but began floundering themselves, leading two more adults to make rescue attempts before all five disappeared in the river

item.title: Cybercrime Gangs Extorted Over $88 Billion In Scams From Asia-Pacific: Report

media:content.media:description: People from at least 80 countries and territories have been identified in scam compounds

item.description: Criminals in Southeast Asia, an epicentre for cyberfraud by mostly Chinese-origin syndicates, are outpacing crackdowns, diversifying revenue streams, exploiting corruption and harnessing artificial intelligence.
item.content:encoded: Criminals in Southeast Asia, an epicentre for cyberfraud by mostly Chinese-origin syndicates, are outpacing crackdowns, diversifying revenue streams, exploiting corruption and harnessing artificial intelligence.
